message:
diag: log raw API output items when response parses as empty

When gpt-5.3-codex produces a response that parses as empty (no text,
no tool calls), emit a warning with the raw output items from the API.
This will reveal whether the model is sending phase-only messages,
null content arrays, or something else we're not parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
